### `id`

integer

### `date_created`

string (date-time)

The moment when the item was created.

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_modified`

string (date-time)

The last moment when the item was modified. A value in year 1750 indicates the value is unknown

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `redacted`

boolean

Does the reimbursement contain redaction(s)?

### `date_raw`

string

Dates as a text string for the date of reimbursements. This is often conference dates (ex. June 2-6, 2011).

Lookups: `contains`, `endswith`, `icontains`, `iendswith`, `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `location`

string

Location of the reimbursement (ex. Harvard Law School, Cambridge, MA).

Lookups: `contains`, `endswith`, `icontains`, `iendswith`, `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `source`

string

Source of the reimbursement (ex. FSU Law School).

Lookups: `contains`, `endswith`, `icontains`, `iendswith`, `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `purpose`

string

Purpose of the reimbursement (ex. Baseball announcer).

Lookups: `contains`, `endswith`, `icontains`, `iendswith`, `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `items_paid_or_provided`

string

Items reimbursed (ex. Room, Airfare).

Lookups: `contains`, `endswith`, `icontains`, `iendswith`, `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `financial_disclosure`

integer

The financial disclosure associated with this reimbursement.

Related endpoint: [`financial_disclosures`](./financial_disclosures.md)
